structural_changes.rationale: Additive schema-compat fix: read indexed_at and feature_artifacts[].kind from new index.json format emitted by feature-delivery close-artifacts. No API surface change. 28 CLI tests pass.
Phase status corrected from phase-4-in-progress to phase-4-ratified to align with AGENTS.md §8 and daedaline.yaml ground truth.

documentation_impact.note: Active memory corrections are in-tier data fixes. active-memory-refresh.ts change requires no doc update. docs/PRD.summary.md phase fix is the doc update itself.
